# External Endpoints

Public endpoints for accessing external service data through the WorldsEdgeLink proxy.

## Endpoints

| Endpoint                                            | Method | Description                                                          |
| --------------------------------------------------- | ------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [proxySteamUserRequest](./proxysteamuserrequest.md) | GET    | Proxy requests to Steam API (get player summaries, avatars, country) |
